data.title: Alpaca Expands into Europe with WealthKernel Acquisition and Launch of European Equities Trading
data.description: Alpaca has successfully made its way into the European market after finalizing its acquisition of WealthKernel. The company has also introduced European equities trading following this acquisition.

data.title: Apple Taps Johny Srouji For Chief Hardware Officer As John Ternus Prepares To Become CEO
data.description: Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) has appointed Johny Srouji as its new chief hardware officer, replacing John Ternus. Srouji, who joined Apple in 2008, previously held the position of senior vice president of hardware technologies. He played a crucial role in initiating Apple's internal chip strategy with the A4 and has been pivotal in advancing various technologies across Apple's product line. CEO Tim Cook commended Srouji's exceptional talent, acknowledging his significant contributions to Apple and the tech industry. This leadership change follows recent developments at Apple.

data.title: Shahi Exports and Innovo Fiber Scale Fibre52® Technology for Lower-Impact Cotton Processing
data.description: In a recent development on April 21, 2026, Shahi Exports, a prominent apparel manufacturer and exporter in India, has announced a strategic collaboration with US company Innovo Fiber LLC. The partnership aims to implement the Fibre52® cotton pretreatment technology within Shahi's extensive textile operations. This integration is set to significantly enhance the production processes at Shahi's knits division. This move signals Shahi Exports' commitment to incorporating cutting-edge solutions in their operations by teaming up with an established player in the industry.

data.title: Prosafe SE reports operational update for March 2026, highlighting key numbers.
data.description: A recent report stated that the global population has reached nearly 7.9 billion people. The current number of confirmed COVID-19 cases worldwide is over 250 million, with approximately 5.1 million deaths. The United States has recorded the highest number of cases, surpassing 40 million infections. Additionally, more than 6 billion COVID-19 vaccine doses have been administered globally. The World Health Organization has warned that although progress has been made, challenges remain in achieving widespread vaccination coverage and controlling the spread of the virus.
